def eligible_for_professional_license(self) -> bool:
        if self.age in [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61] and \
           self.employment_status in [EmploymentStatus.EMPLOYED.name, EmploymentStatus.RETIRED.name, \
                                      EmploymentStatus.UNEMPLOYED.name, EmploymentStatus.STUDENT.name] and \
           self.education in [Education.HIGH_SCHOOL.name, Education.COLLEGE.name, Education.BACHELOR.name, \
                             Education.MASTER.name, Education.DOCTOR.name] and \
           self.experience_years in [2, 5]:
            return True
        else:
            return False
